name: CAST Wines
seoDescription: CAST Wines — a boutique Geyserville winery crafting limited-production Zinfandel, Sauvignon Blanc and Cabernet from a CCOF Certified Organic estate vineyard in Dry Creek Valley.

hero.heading: Certified organic estate wines in Dry Creek Valley
hero.subheading: A boutique Geyserville winery crafting limited-production Zinfandel, Sauvignon Blanc, and Cabernet from a Certified Organic estate vineyard.

about.heading: Our Story
body: CAST Wines opened in 2012 when founding proprietor Jack Seifrick and a small group of friends fell under the spell of a beautiful property in Sonoma's Dry Creek Valley. The name comes from the spell that was cast over them on that first visit — a feeling they have worked to preserve and share ever since.

The wines are made by Mikael Gulyash, a Northern California native who has spent virtually his entire career in the Sonoma County wine business. After earning a degree in organic chemistry, he honed his craft at Sonoma's legendary Jordan Estate before becoming a winemaker in his own right.

CAST has farmed sustainably since day one, and the estate vineyard is now officially CCOF Certified Organic under the USDA National Organic Program. The result is a boutique, limited-production portfolio that reflects both the land and the care behind it.

services.title: Terrace & Tasting Room Flights
services.description: Guided seated tastings on the outdoor terrace overlooking the vineyards, or indoors in the tasting room. Walk-ins welcome; reservations recommended.

services.title: Vineyard Tour & Tasting
services.description: A reservable tour of the estate vineyard paired with a wine tasting and an accompaniment of cheese and charcuterie.

services.title: Barrel Room Tasting
services.description: An intimate seated tasting in the barrel room by advance reservation, for a behind-the-scenes look at the wines.

items.quote: Cast is a great winery for a tasting. Joe walked us through a variety of wines with great information and an even better view.
items.author: Margo L.

items.quote: Joe and Corey were great hosts! They walked us through a variety of delicious wines.
items.author: Brenda H.

items.quote: Our hotel recommended Cast as the best place to sip and savor the view — otherwise we probably would have driven right by.
items.author: ScottD58

items.a: You'll find us at 8500 Dry Creek Rd.
